# MAS-AI Technologies Inc.

> MAS-AI Technologies Inc. is a Canadian AI company building Daena, a governance-first AI agent orchestration platform.

## Company Overview

MAS-AI Technologies Inc. builds enterprise AI systems where governance is built into the architecture, not bolted on afterward. The company's flagship product, Daena, is an AI-native company operating system that coordinates 48 specialized AI agents with full auditability and decision traceability.

## Product: Daena

Daena is a governance-first AI agent orchestration platform with two patent-pending architectures:

### PhiLattice Architecture (Patent Pending)
Fibonacci spiral scaling combined with honeycomb departmental structure for governed multi-agent collaboration. Agents are organized into 8 departments with 6 agents each, following a Fibonacci growth pattern for scalability.

### Neural-Backed Memory Fabric / NBMF (Patent Pending)
5-tier memory system where hallucinations auto-expire and only verified knowledge persists. Tiers range from ephemeral working memory to founder-private encrypted storage.

### 10-Stage Execution Pipeline
Every agent action passes through: SecurityGate, InputValidator, GovernanceEngine, ContextBuilder, ReasoningCore, ActionPlanner, OutputValidator, ResponseFormatter, FeedbackLoop, AuditLog.

## Recognition

- Google for Startups Cloud Program: Accepted
- Perplexity for Startups: Approved (Enterprise Pro + API credits)
- 2 USPTO Provisional Patents: PhiLattice Architecture, Neural-Backed Memory Fabric

## Portfolio

- Daena: AI-native company OS with governed multi-agent orchestration
- Construction AI: AI solutions for construction industry optimization
- MedSmart: Healthcare AI for diagnostics and patient care
- NatureNLP: Environmental monitoring and analysis through NLP

## Technical Capabilities

- Multi-agent orchestration with governance
- 48 agents across 8 departments
- 300+ automated tests
- Multi-model support (routes to optimal LLM per task)
- Self-hosted and cloud deployment options
- Enterprise-DNA layer: Genome, Epigenome, Lineage, Immune system
